items.title: Web Development
items.text: I build fast, responsive, and scalable websites using modern technologies, ensuring clean code, strong performance, and a seamless experience across all devices.

items.title: Mobile Development
items.text: I develop user-friendly mobile applications with smooth performance, intuitive interfaces, and reliable functionality tailored for both Android and iOS platforms.

items.title: Game Design & Development
items.text: I create engaging games with creative concepts, interactive gameplay, optimized performance, and visually appealing designs for an enjoyable user experience.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.text: I design clean and intuitive user interfaces focused on usability, aesthetics, and user experience to ensure clarity, consistency, and visual appeal.

items.title: Social Media Marketing
items.text: I create effective social media strategies and visuals to boost engagement, grow brand awareness, and connect businesses with their target audience.

items.title: Branding & Advertising
items.text: I build strong brand identities through creative design, consistent visuals, and impactful advertising that helps businesses stand out confidently.
